title: Archery Exprogrammer Art (plus shields)
description: Programmer art support for Archery Expansion + Archery Expansion Squared, as well as Shield Expansion
body:
adds programmer art support for Archery Expansion + Archery Expansion Squared. that's about it.

- [Archery Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/archery-expansion/versions)
  - Items: 100%
  - Particles: 100%
  - Entities: 100%
- [Archery Expansion: Squared](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/archery-expansion-squared)
  - Items: 75%
- [Shield Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/shield-expansion)
  - Items: 75%
